textByHashes.c1ead70edd2bb8f62950d99cfd7ee1d1e4116f4f: Ah, 'tis a foine day to be sure! Were yez wantin' me to store yer tools, or maybe ye might be wantin' yer stuff back from me?
textByHashes.b176550dd4670fe29828644ee5ab50bb6ec7df86: Nay, ye be wantin' to ask Shamus if ye wants to know about the Lost City. He be living up a tree somewhere near Draynor Village. Last I heard he were wailin' about some biggun tryin' to chop his tree down!
textByHashes.129c343df74b9d84782c2713ac32003d31010056: Aye, top o' th' mornin' to ya! Are ye wantin' help with th' tool store?
textByHashes.c6c306ab7d659d19685ed7026a64dbbaf9555d95: We tool leprechauns work hard, that we do. An' nary a penny do we get in return. So ye cannae begrudge me mah holiday an' a wee drink or twelve!
textByHashes.d7a8086aa97fda8f2e7db3f48ccba8b63feb6a32: Ahh, but I likes th' ruggedy mountain, ye see. Also, I ha' a terrible allergy to sand.
textByHashes.3716b1fcf993424e036edf123005d0c1ef01d1d0: So were ye wantin' help with th' tool store?
textByHashes.1b830ec798e7df9c2ea56ad1c209fa57962dd198: Ye must be dafter than ye look if ye likes luggin' yer tools everywhere ye goes!
textByHashes.f8bcff4e22d5e876af549a0d9a244ce6047cfca0: Ach! Can ye no' leave a body to ha' a little peace? Very well, I have a bit o' stuff to trade with ye. But don't be expectin' yerself any discounts.
textByHashes.482fdd2b1e6e5e3ae193a66679057b05f06aa7f8: An' get ambushed by that damn bird again? Nae, I'll be keeping my distance, thank ye very much!
textByHashes.b8b460040c3e1b291265e6c7a858cab0094ce64b: Plus, if ye've got a farmin' patch up 'ere, th' union boys'll want me posted nearer it.
textByHashes.8fd9dcb37e267509c62285c9f39e1b832e436c39: An' why would I not be here? Now that there be farming patches, there'll be folk needing a leprechaun to hold their stuff! So, dod ye want to be using the store?
textByHashes.699ce6d3e36e34d2a8eb01a7c84880b19a0d4b7e: We'll hold onto yer rake, yer seed dibber, yer spade, yer secateurs, yer waterin' can and yer trowel - but mind it's not one of them fancy trowels only archaeologists use!
textByHashes.09cc072ce566b8d3a0e2c17e1257a77c3e5583a6: We'll take a few buckets off yer hands too, and even yer compost, supercompost an' ultracompost! Also plant cure vials.
textByHashes.6526bab9d667d3485692068b85789f9ccc5ca746: Aside from that, if ye hands me yer farming produce, I can mebbe change it into banknotes for ye.
textByHashes.e23653d58501ab1f9790d660209b22fb309ed1b8: So... do ye want to be using the store?
textByHashes.602a058d07bda3fc957ec37a09ec81556daf8418: We leprechauns have a shed where we keep 'em. It's a magic shed, so ye can get yer items back from any of us leprechauns whenever ye want. Saves ye havin' to carry loads of stuff around the country!
textByHashes.d9fab5c8596135b57c2655542069af2f26c8ab14: Nay, I've got no banknotes to exchange for that item.
textByHashes.679d53a62dee1184614dc87ec27b516d6f57afac: Nay, there's no such thing as a banknote for that.
textByHashes.630faf369145e831b343d06183f1d8a43938fe96: A cabbage? Don't ye go showing me yer cabbage; this whole farm stinks of the things! Take it away and get it exchanged somewhere else.
textByHashes.d5b583bb9cfec8e99cbe5510a256ce8ea7be5ecd: Ye did foine, yer'll be wanting this!
